title: ‚Äč‚ÄčLocal government reorganisation: implementation letter to Surrey council chief executives
body: "‚Äč‚ÄčOn 28 October 2025, Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government officials wrote to the chief executives of Surrey councils to provide information around the secondary legislation that will be taken forward to implement the proposal for 2 unitary councils in Surrey.‚Äč "
